arts.ttl: Guardiola hands Arsenal double boost as £50m Gittens transfer decision made
arts.sum: Arsenal could be on course for a Premier League title boost following a big Manchester City admission by Pep Guardiola. football.london says: "Though neither are likely to be out with injury for much longer, any game for Man City will be made significantly harder by the absence of two key squad leaders.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Ref rejects Premier League statement as dressing room reaction revealed
arts.sum: Arsenal will be looking to bounce back from their Premier League defeat to Bournemouth with fixtures against Shakhtar Donetsk and Liverpool to come in the next seven days for the Gunners

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Arsenal could land Dusan Vlahovic in cut-price deal in 2025
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly hopeful of signing long-time transfer target Dusan Vlahovic from Juventus in a cut-price deal in 2025.

arts.ttl: Weekend Review: Arsenal suffer nightmare of a matchday
arts.sum: Liverpool and Manchester City both eked out important, closely fought wins to steal a march on title-rivals Arsenal in the Premier League, while Real Madrid and Barcelona both ensured that they head into next week's Clasico (Saturday, 3 p.m. ET; stream live on ESPN+ ) off the back of victories. Between them, Southampton and Leicester City had only won once this season in 10 combined Premier League games, the Foxes getting the best of Bournemouth two weeks ago, so both teams knew how massive this encounter was.

arts.ttl: Thomas Partey demands Arsenal teammates heed Mikel Arteta warning after Bournemouth slip
arts.sum: Arsenal once again failed to keep 11 men on the pitch and were punished as two second-half goals condemned them to a surprise Premier League defeat at Bournemouth

arts.ttl: Neville: Arsenal the only team who can take on ominous Man City
arts.sum: Manchester City's late winner at Wolves was an ominous moment for their title rivals, says Gary Neville, who believes there is a feeling of inevitability around Pep Guardiola's side and their Premier League challenge once again.

arts.ttl: Arsenal next five Premier League fixtures compared to Liverpool and Man City in title drama
arts.sum: Here, football.london has the full list of Arsenal's next five Premier League matches compared to Liverpool and City. Meanwhile, Slot's Liverpool overcame Chelsea without being at their best on Sunday, leaving the loss to Nottingham Forest still a big exception to what has been an impressive start.

arts.ttl: Do Arsenal have a red card problem - and could it cost them the title?
arts.sum: Just eight games into the Premier League season and Arsenal have already had three players sent off - but just how costly could it be?

arts.ttl: 'For me': Emmanuel Petit says one Arsenal player just isn't producing good enough performances right now
arts.sum: Arsenal dropped points in the title race this weekend as they lost at Bournemouth and Emmanuel Petit believes one player isn’t doing the business at...
